k1_system_boot: >>> SYSTEM INITIALIZING... Error. Hero profile not found. Creating new profile...
k1_system_error: >>> WARNING: Memory fragments corrupted. Identity: UNKNOWN. Level: 1. Initiating emergency protocol...
k1_protag_where: What... where am I? My head... I can't remember anything.
k1_aria_fragment: >>> A.R.I.A. System fragment activated. Integrity: 12%. Connection to hero established.
k1_protag_voice: A voice? Who... who are you? Are you inside my head?
k1_aria_explain: I am A.R.I.A. - your system interface. Or at least what's left of it. My data is almost completely corrupted. But one thing I know for certain: you must survive.
k1_protag_forest: A forest. As far as the eye can see. The trees are... enormous. Ancient. But something feels wrong.
k1_aria_scan: >>> Environment scan complete. Location: Unknown. Threat level: MODERATE. I'm detecting life signatures nearby.
k1_protag_nothing: I have no sword. No armor. Not even shoes. What the hell happened here?
k1_aria_wolves_detected: >>> WARNING: Multiple hostile signatures detected. Shadow wolves. Distance: 30 meters. And closing.
k1_protag_wolves: Wolves?! Shadow... wolves? Their eyes - they're glowing! What do I do?!
k1_choice_fight_wolves: I'll face them. Running won't solve anything.
k1_choice_flee_wolves: I'm unarmed - I need to get out of here!
k1_protag_ran: That... that was close. I think one of them almost got me.
k1_aria_fled_comment: >>> Escape successful. However... you will need to learn to fight. This world is not kind to the weak.
k1_aria_analysis: >>> Combat analysis complete. Your reflexes are remarkable - as if your body remembers what your mind has forgotten.
k1_protag_level: What just happened? I feel... stronger? Like something inside me shifted.
k1_aria_levelup_explain: >>> Experience points registered. Your level has increased! In this world, every battle makes you stronger. I'll track your progress.
k1_system_fragments: >>> ANOMALY DETECTED... Memory fragments found in neural network. Three combat paths identified.
k1_system_paths: >>> Path analysis: SWORDMASTER - raw power and endurance. MAGE - arcane might and ranged combat. ASSASSIN - speed and critical strikes.
k1_aria_choose_path: Your body remembers fighting techniques, even if your mind doesn't. Which path feels right?
k1_choice_swordmaster: Swordmaster - The blade is an extension of my arm.
k1_choice_mage: Mage - I feel a power simmering inside me.
k1_choice_assassin: Assassin - Speed. Precision. One strike is all it takes.
k1_aria_class_confirmed: >>> Combat path confirmed. Basic abilities unlocked. Memory fragment absorbed.
k1_protag_feels_right: Yes... that feels right. Like I've done this a thousand times before.
k1_aria_path_ahead: >>> I'm detecting a structure up ahead. Perhaps we'll find clues about your identity there. Or at least a weapon.
k1_protag_hut: An abandoned hut? Nobody's lived here in ages. But look at this...
k1_aria_hut_scan: >>> Scan: Structure abandoned for at least 3 years. But I'm detecting a document with an unusual energy signature.
k1_protag_note: A note... 'If you're reading this, you're too late. HE has already won. Flee to Eldenrath.' Who is 'HE'?
k1_aria_note_analysis: >>> Handwriting analysis: Unknown. But the ink contains traces of shadow magic. Whoever wrote this knew about the threat.
k1_aria_rest: >>> Recommendation: Rest. Your body has endured severe strain. I'll monitor the surroundings.
k1_protag_who_am_i: ARIA... who am I? Why can't I remember anything? Not even my own name.
k1_aria_comfort: Your memories aren't lost - they're sealed. Someone or something took them from you. But they're still there. I can sense the fragments.
k1_protag_find_out: Then I'll get them back. Every single one. No matter what it takes.
k1_aria_boss_defeated: >>> Wolf Alpha eliminated! Experience points and loot acquired. Your combat style grows sharper with every fight.
k1_protag_did_it: The pack leader... done. My hands are shaking, but I'm still standing.
k1_aria_settlement: >>> Long-range scan reveals a settlement at the forest's edge. Distance: 2 kilometers. Energy signatures indicate human inhabitants.
k1_protag_lets_go: A settlement... Eldenrath? Like in the note? Maybe I'll find answers there.
k1_consq_fight_protag: Wait... among the remains. A wolf fang, big as my finger. It pulses with dark energy.
k1_consq_fight_aria: >>> Item acquired: Shadow Wolf Fang. Rare crafting material. Your first proof that you can fight.
k1_consq_flee_aria: >>> Analysis: The wolves are no longer pursuing. However, shadow wolves mark their territory. This forest won't get any safer.
k1_consq_flee_protag: Next time, I won't run. Next time, I stand my ground.
k1_consq_sword_aria: >>> Path SWORDMASTER initialized. Muscle memory activated. Combat power bonus unlocked. Your body remembers the weight of a blade.
k1_consq_sword_protag: My hands... they form the grip on their own. As if they've never held anything else.
k1_consq_mage_aria: >>> Path MAGE initialized. Arcane resonance activated. Mana reservoir unlocked. I'm detecting energy flows in your fingertips.
k1_consq_mage_protag: There's a tingling in my hands... like electricity. The air around me is vibrating.
k1_consq_assassin_aria: >>> Path ASSASSIN initialized. Reflex optimization activated. Critical hit bonus unlocked. Your perception has doubled.
k1_consq_assassin_protag: Everything is... sharper. I can hear every twig snap, see every shadow. Like a predator.
